theme: the believable-profile release + the presenter-grade / scalable-generation extension. v1.9 told the STORY (org dashboard + verified-skill spine); v1.10 makes each CHARACTER hold up under a close-up. When a presenter clicks 'Login as' a hero, the individual's PROFILE (org name, role+title, work history, education, a real face, deep role-aligned skills) AND the content surfaces they land on (library + activity feed) populate with real semantic content, on EVERY page a hero of that vantage can reach — proven by a Playwright SEMANTIC coverage sweep with zero empty pages and zero out-of-demo escapes (M39 profile identity + M40 Directus serve-grant + M41 profile depth + M42e/M42m the two per-vantage coverage GATES). The EXTENSION (M43->M46): M43 cockpit UX polish (the light presenter launcher, one CTA, manifest download, login-progress overlay), M44 whole-roster profile completeness (every member+manager baked: trajectory self-ratings + certificates + projects + avatars; DATA DENSITY), M45 a cheap-LLM generation engine (cmd/gen-batch + a prompt-keyed cache + the CODE-owns-structure / AI-owns-content boundary; the FIRST new third-party dep — deliberate), M46 org-scale fill (a whole ~500/735-member org from one supporting-population descriptor) + a gen-batch preview CLI. Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits throughout.

benchmarks: n/a — no performance-sensitive hot path across the release (the seeders are DB-IO-bound bulk COPY/UPSERT; the cockpit is a stdlib HTTP server; the gen-batch path is LLM-IO-bound with a prompt-hash cache). The org-scale render WALL the M46 gate hit was a PLATFORM render-perf characteristic (next-web pagination + missing FK indexes), addressed by the T1 demo-patch (84s -> ~4s), not a rext hot path. No rext benchmark target.

headline: Tooling + docs only — ZERO platform-repo edits throughout (verified: the rosetta release diff is confined to corpus/** + knowledge/plan/** + CLAUDE.md + .gitignore; no .go/.py/.sh/stack-* files). All 5 Clerkenstein alignment gates 100%/100%. Significant test growth (stack-seeding 444->706 [+262]; rext total 1248->1551 [+303]). The release makes each logged-in hero a fully-fleshed, believable person (profile identity + content-surface unblock + profile depth) proven by a Playwright SEMANTIC coverage sweep at BOTH vantages cold, then EXTENDS to a presenter-grade cockpit + a cheap-LLM generation engine that fills a whole ~500/735-member org from one descriptor, proven live on demo-3. The supply-chain inflection (the first new dep since v1.8, the `ai` lib) was a deliberate, user-acknowledged in-release decision. The 5th M46 gate face (the manager enterprise grids — a platform-bound org-scale render wall) was cleared by a demo-patch/recapture campaign with ZERO canonical edits.
notes: 9-milestone release (M39/M40/M41 section + M42e/M42m iterative + M43/M44 section + M45/M46 iterative). The CODE-of-record lives in the rosetta-extensions authoring copy (a SEPARATE git repo) at the v1.10 tags — close-release merged ONLY the rosetta release/01.10-method-acting doc-half branch into main + tagged v1.10. Pushing the ext tags + main + the v1.10 tag to origin is the orchestrator's separate post-close step (LOCAL-only here). M46 verification was unusually deep: a 4-sub-agent demo-patch/recapture campaign + orchestrator audits + a fresh --purge /demo-up reproducibility proof + render-verify. Carry-forward: CI-wiring for the corpus (no executable suite exists; rext suites verified per-milestone at their tags) + pushing the ext tags + main + the v1.10 tag to origin (the orchestrator's step).
